across.clue: Kiss, in Spanish — like the language of Spain's World Cup champions parading before nearly 2 million fans
Sharp, like Jamie Dimon's warning that markets underestimate risks as he refuses to buy stocks or Treasurys
Rapid attack — like the U.S. carrying out its 10th consecutive night of strikes on Iran
Consumer — like someone affected by Taco Bell's cyclosporiasis-linked lettuce controversy
Prefix meaning trillion — like the scale of Bristol Myers's AI supercomputer build with Nvidia

down.clue: Infant — like the JD and Usha Vance 'perfect baby boy' Trump shared a photo of
Brilliant sensation — like the worldwide wonder sparked by an Australian woman delivering 'miracle' identical quadruplets, a one-in-15-million occurrence
